guidelines: Display user identity clearly: avatar, name, and role/bio
Organize profile content into logical tabs or sections
Provide easy access to edit profile actions
colorGuidance: Neutral background with a banner or accent header area
Avatar with a subtle border or ring in brand color
Tab active indicator in brand accent
commonMistakes: Avatar too small to recognize the person
No empty states for profile sections with no content
Edit button hard to find or missing
Inconsistent layout between own profile and other profiles
qualityChecklist: Profile loads gracefully with skeleton states
Edit actions are clearly accessible to the profile owner
Content tabs load without full page reload
Profile works with long names and bios
